title: MC warzone
description: MC Warzone is a military-themed Minecraft mod pack that adds modern weapons and tactical gear to your survival. Customize your loadout, and fight your way through intense battles. Enter the Warzone and test your skills on the frontlines.
body:
**MC Warzone**
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
A military-themed Minecraft modpack that brings modern weapons, tactical gear, and intense firefights into your survival. Customize your loadout and face high-stakes missions across maps filled with cover and vertical gameplay.

**Why play it**

Tactical FPS-inspired experience with a realistic feeling
Clear and rewarding progression system
Clean interface focused on combat awareness
Great for both solo sessions and coordinated co-op

**Key Feature**s

Expanded arsenal. From close-quarters weapons to heavy equipment with attachments and variants
Tactical gameplay. Aim without crosshair, recoil management, injuries with real consequences, and enhanced movement mechanics
Tools and gear. Grappling hooks, recon utilities, and operator kits.
Quality of life. Improved menus, sound, and feedback for smoother gameplay

**Highlighted Mods**

Weapons & Equipment
- TaCZ Timeless and Classics Zero
- TaCZ addon
- LesRaisins Armor

**Requirements & Compatibilit**y

- Game version. Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)
- Recommended RAM. at least 5 GB allocated
- System. SSD strongly recommended, updated Java required
- Shaders. not included, but you can install them manually if desired
  
**Map cooming soon.....!




-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
